description: Capability-based routing guidance. Model and provider mapping remain user-configurable and are never forced by the ecosystem.

routing_profiles.notes: Map to whichever model the target project already prefers.
Use for quick analysis and review passes.
Only use when the project actually needs image-aware work.
Keep browser automation separate from code-only workflows.

selection_rules.when: existing project config defines a provider or model
a user supplies explicit model mappings

fallback_strategy.notes: Use whichever provider the project already uses. Do not force Claude, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Ollama, or any other vendor in the bootstrap.
